title: set used without require silently succeeds
description: TRIGGER: script uses 'set' command without require ["variables"]; EVALUATOR runs 'set' unconditionally (eval_stmt line 154 does not gate on variables_enabled); check_extension_use EXTENSION_COMMANDS does not include 'set'. RFC 5229 §6.1 requires declaration before use. BAD BEHAVIOR: the script compiles without error; 'set' stores the variable but variables_enabled=false so expansion is suppressed — silently no-ops instead of failing at compile time as the RFC requires.
